General.Name: Asia Tele-Net and Technology Corp Ltd
General.Description: Asia Tele-Net and Technology Corporation Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the electroplating business. It operates through the Electroplating Equipment, Property Investment, and Treasury Management segments. The company designs, manufactures, and sells electroplating machines and other industrial machinery. It also provides electroplating machine installation, management, after-sales, and treasury management services, as well as spare parts. In addition, the company is involved in securities trading, property holding and investment, software development, and money lending businesses. It operates in the People's Republic of China, Korea, Mexico, the United States, the Philippines, the United Kingdom, Taiwan, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Process Automation (Holdings) Ltd and changed its name to Asia Tele-Net and Technology Corporation Limited in 1999. Asia Tele-Net and Technology Corporation Limited was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Tai Yau Building, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
